nodes.name: Jasper
nodes.storage_role: Local NVMe for model weights + working data
nodes.responsibilities: Runs all GPU-accelerated LLM inference (Qwen 32B, DeepSeek, LLaMA 70B). Hosts the OpenClaw gateway that orchestrates AI agents across all nodes. Primary development and monitoring workstation.
nodes.why_it_matters: This is the brain of the cluster — a workstation-class GPU doing real AI inference, not just running Docker containers. It proves hands-on ML/AI ops experience with production-grade hardware.

nodes.name: Nova
nodes.storage_role: Primary NAS — shared datasets, model cache, backups, config state
nodes.responsibilities: Ansible controller managing Mira and Orin. Hosts TrueNAS for centralized storage. Runs the homelab-controller automation (29 priorities: SLOs, incidents, chaos, evidence, gatekeeper). Serves as the 'ops brain' of the cluster.
nodes.why_it_matters: Shows infrastructure-as-code discipline — Ansible playbooks, automated health checks, and a custom SRE pipeline that rivals what you'd see at a mid-size SaaS company.

nodes.name: Mira
nodes.storage_role: Local SSD for VM storage, NFS mount from Nova for shared data
nodes.responsibilities: Runs utility VMs and containers — DNS, monitoring agents, test environments. Serves as a chaos testing target and resilience validation node. Managed via Ansible from Nova.
nodes.why_it_matters: Demonstrates heterogeneous fleet management — not every node needs to be top-spec. Managing mixed hardware is a real-world skill that shows operational maturity.

nodes.name: Orin
nodes.storage_role: Local RAID for VM storage, NFS mount from Nova
nodes.responsibilities: Enterprise-grade Dell PowerEdge running heavy compute workloads. Dual Xeon processors for parallel tasks. 10GbE uplink for high-throughput data transfer. Managed via Ansible from Nova.
nodes.why_it_matters: Real enterprise server hardware (PowerEdge R630) shows you can work with datacenter-class equipment, not just consumer PCs. ECC memory and redundant power prove reliability thinking.
